PropertyValue: ISNULL((SELECT TOP 1 cpt.AdjustableDims FROM AITSHIPVIAMap v LEFT JOIN AITShip_CarrierPackageType cpt on cpt.carrier = v.carrier WHERE v.shipcode = ShipCode AND cpt.SLPackageType = pkt.package_type),0)

CASE WHEN EXISTS(     SELECT 1      FROM AIT_SS_BOL_package sh     INNER JOIN AIT_SS_BOL_package pa     ON sh.shipment_id = pa.shipment_id      AND sh.package_id = pa.ref_package_id     WHERE sh.shipment_id = ShipmentId      AND sh.package_id = PackageId)  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
CASE   WHEN PackageId IS NULL THEN 0   ELSE 1 END
(SELECT Top 1 1 FROM AIT_SS_ChildPackages x where x.RefType = 'B' and x.RefNum = shipkg.shipment_id and x.ParentPackageID = shipkg.package_id)
CASE   WHEN RefPackageId IS NULL THEN 0   ELSE 1 END

( SELECT TOP 1 cs.tracking_number  FROM carrier_ship AS cs  WHERE cs.shipment_id=ShipmentId  AND cs.package_id=PackageId  AND cs.void_ind=0 AND NOT EXISTS(SELECT * FROM carrier_ship as ups                                                  WHERE ups.tracking_number=cs.tracking_number                                                        AND ups.shipment_id=ShipmentId                                                      AND ups.package_id=PackageId                                                      AND ups.void_ind=1                               ) ORDER BY cs.RecordDate DESC )
ISNULL((SELECT TOP 1 1 FROM AITShip_CarrierPackageType x where x.SLPackageType = shipkg.package_type and x.isFreight = 1),0)
